content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates all four VIEW components throughout. Wonder is genuine and specific to what's actually in front of them — the exhale, the tight smile, the voice 'annoyed that you tried to breathe at it' — rather than generic probing. Impartiality is strong: the coach is not trying to make the critic stop, not selling a technique, and explicitly refuses to give a tool in turn 14 ('I'm not going to give you a way to turn it down'). Empathy is felt rather than performed — no validation noises, no 'thank you for sharing'; instead, slowing down with 'You've been holding this a long time.' Vulnerability shows up as undefended honesty and willingness to be wrong: 'Is that wrong?' in turn 14 offers the read openly without needing to be right. Pace consistently slows when the client speeds up and armors — turns 8, 10, 12 all decline the bait of pivoting to tools and stay with what's actually happening. The coach holds silence-like space ('Stay with the exhaustion for a second — not the story about the exhaustion'). No agenda-leakage, no preacher mode, no stacked anxious questions.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the body (exhale, tight smile) rather than answering the technique question. Curious, not strategic."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects back the client's own phrase precisely ('the knowing doesn't touch it') — empathy through accuracy, not validation noises."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Meets the client's preemptive defense ('that's not ridiculous — that's actually really precise information') without defensiveness. Slightly stacks questions at the end, minor wobble."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly declines the theory frame the client offered. Stays with felt experience. Impartial and slow."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the pivot to tools. Holds the real thing the client said. No agenda except staying present."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'The critic even ate the therapy' — undefended, accurate, and warm. Then slows down further: 'You've been holding this a long time.' Pace mismatch with client's rush is exactly right."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the war/loneliness underneath and offers it openly with 'Is that wrong?' — willing to be off. Explicitly declines to give a tool. This is the breakthrough-condition move delivered from genuine stance, not as a clever insight."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "voice-as-care", "resistance"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["apply-view-to-the-voice", "whats-the-case-against-it", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "notes": "Stance is the strength of this conversation. Some signature questions weren't used, but that belongs to Methodology Fidelity."
}
